Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level production_ready claim is honestly FALSE (manifest and command-evidence both status=implemented_pending_review, production_ready=false); the design correctly separates production_ready_candidate (local validation passed: coverage.valid && foundation.valid) from the false pack-level production_ready, so there is no overclaim. Plan binding is consistent and self-checked: closeout-pack-plan.json CP00-322 (unit_count 150, risk C, deviation_from_plan=false, source_ledger_sha 13c7ed65...) matches the registry constants and the prompt's deliverable_distribution (impl 70 / ui 23 / contract 8 / security_audit 16 / claude_review 5 / failure_recovery 10 / test 18 = 150) and micro_title_distribution; all 11 required section-row sets and per-micro/per-phase counts (P01=14, P02=136) reconcile. Descriptor-only boundaries are enforced by validators.js (every row descriptor_only=true / runtime_execution=false / customer_safe_errors_only=true / raw_payload_included=false; no-leak guards for permission-decision, audit-hint, validation-error, blocked-claim, and lock-token; cross_tenant_access_allowed=false; matter_trace_required=true; no state writes, idempotency persistence, runtime locks, db writes, rollback/retry, test runtime, or integration-smoke runtime). No real data and no product-state writes: descriptor source (registry/service/validators) performs no fs/network/process/child_process calls, the test and validator script only READ files, outputs are Object.freeze'd, and all no_write_attestation flags are false. Authority boundary preserved: Claude is read-only and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true), and Hermes patterns appear only as deterministic descriptor evidence-packet/receipt metadata (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not embedded product runtime. CP178+ review hardening is satisfied: readiness auth-preflight exit 0 with 1437-byte valid JSON stdout (no auth failure, no 0-byte, no malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped output), tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob, forbidden_tools_present=false, prompt within size limit, summary_only correctly disallowed (Risk C + security/review deliverables), and the post-review gated commands (closeout-pack:validate, receipt normalize/validate, plan:generate, git diff --check --cached) are correctly deferred until the accepted review result exists. Recorded validation commands (npm test, validate, weighted/spec/fullplan/goal/rp00/rp05-rp10 validates, git diff --check) are all exit 0. One trivial P3 nit found (an unused documentation_entry key in CP322 row extras); no P0/P1/P2 issues.
